name: small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: manual reconciliation processes lead to cash flow gaps

locked_fields.primary_problem: manual reconciliation processes lead to cash flow gaps
